tEn: Domain Randomization for Transferring Deep Neural Networks from Simulation to the Real World
tZh: 域随机化：将深度神经网络从模拟迁移到现实世界
sEn: Domain randomization enables training deep neural networks on simulated images that transfer to real-world object localization and grasping without any real data.
sZh: 域随机化技术使得仅使用模拟图像训练的深度神经网络能够成功迁移到现实世界，实现物体定位和抓取，无需任何真实数据。
absEn: Bridging the 'reality gap' that separates simulated robotics from experiments on hardware could accelerate robotic research through improved data availability. This paper explores domain randomization, a simple technique for training models on simulated images that transfer to real images by randomizing rendering in the simulator. With enough variability in the simulator, the real world may appear to the model as just another variation. We focus on the task of object localization, which is a stepping stone to general robotic manipulation skills. We find that it is possible to train a real-world object detector that is accurate to $1.5$cm and robust to distractors and partial occlusions using only data from a simulator with non-realistic random textures. To demonstrate the capabilities of our detectors, we show they can be used to perform grasping in a cluttered environment. To our knowledge, this is the first successful transfer of a deep neural network trained only on simulated RGB images (without pre-training on real images) to the real world for the purpose of robotic control.
absZh: 弥合模拟机器人与硬件实验之间的“现实差距”可以通过改善数据可用性来加速机器人研究。本文探讨了域随机化，这是一种简单的技术，通过在模拟器中随机化渲染来训练模型，使其能够迁移到真实图像。当模拟器中的变化足够多时，现实世界可能只是模型眼中的另一种变化。我们专注于物体定位任务，这是通用机器人操作技能的基石。我们发现，仅使用来自具有非真实随机纹理的模拟器的数据，就可以训练出一个精度达到1.5厘米、对干扰物和部分遮挡具有鲁棒性的现实世界物体检测器。为了展示我们检测器的能力，我们展示了它们可以用于在杂乱环境中进行抓取。据我们所知，这是首次成功将仅使用模拟RGB图像训练的深度神经网络（无需在真实图像上预训练）迁移到现实世界用于机器人控制。

contrib.en: First successful transfer of deep neural network trained only on simulated RGB images to real-world robotic control.
contrib.zh: 首次成功将仅使用模拟RGB图像训练的深度神经网络迁移到真实机器人控制。

contrib.en: Domain randomization enables object localization accurate to 1.5 cm in the real world.
contrib.zh: 域随机化使真实世界物体定位精度达到1.5厘米。

contrib.en: Non-realistic random textures suffice for sim-to-real transfer without pre-training on real images.
contrib.zh: 非真实随机纹理足以实现模拟到真实的迁移，无需在真实图像上预训练。

contrib.en: Detectors robust to distractors and partial occlusions, enabling grasping in cluttered environments.
contrib.zh: 检测器对干扰物和部分遮挡具有鲁棒性，可在杂乱环境中执行抓取。

contrib.en: Ablation study shows randomization of textures and camera pose critical for transfer success.
contrib.zh: 消融研究表明纹理和相机位姿的随机化对迁移成功至关重要。

contrib.en: Method generalizes to real-world objects with non-uniform textures (e.g., YCB objects).
contrib.zh: 方法泛化到具有非均匀纹理的真实物体（如YCB物体）。

limits.en: Method assumes fixed table height, limiting to 2D pose estimation.
limits.zh: 方法假设固定桌面高度，仅限于2D姿态估计。

limits.en: Requires manual placement of simulated camera to roughly match real viewpoint.
limits.zh: 需要手动放置模拟相机以大致匹配真实视角。

limits.en: Accuracy limited to ~1.5 cm; insufficient for high-precision or contact-rich manipulation.
limits.zh: 精度限制在约1.5厘米；不足以用于高精度或接触丰富的操作。

limits.en: Evaluation only on geometric objects and one YCB object; generalizability to diverse objects unverified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于几何物体和一个YCB物体；对多样化物体的泛化性未验证。

limits.en: No comparison with domain adaptation methods; combination may improve performance.
limits.zh: 未与域适应方法比较；结合可能提升性能。

items.en: Bridging the ‘reality gap’ that separates simulated robotics from experiments on hardware could accelerate robotic research through improved data availability. This paper explores domain randomization, a simple technique for training models on simulated images that transfer to real images by randomizing rendering in the simulator. With enough variability in the simulator, the real world may appear to the model as just another variation. We focus on the task of object localization, which is a stepping stone to general robotic manipulation skills. We find that it is possible to train a real-world object detector that is accurate to 1.5 cmtimes1.5centimeter1.5\text{\,}\mathrm{cm} and robust to distractors and partial occlusions using only data from a simulator with non-realistic random textures. To demonstrate the capabilities of our detectors, we show they can be used to perform grasping in a cluttered environment. To our knowledge, this is the first successful transfer of a deep neural network trained only on simulated RGB images (without pre-training on real images) to the real world for the purpose of robotic control.
items.zh: 弥合模拟机器人与硬件实验之间的“现实差距”，可以通过改善数据可用性来加速机器人研究。本文探讨了域随机化，这是一种简单的技术，通过在模拟器中随机化渲染，在模拟图像上训练模型，使其能够迁移到真实图像。当模拟器中的变异性足够大时，真实世界在模型看来可能只是另一种变体。我们专注于目标定位任务，这是通用机器人操作技能的基石。我们发现，仅使用来自具有非真实随机纹理的模拟器的数据，就可以训练出一个在真实世界中精度达到1.5厘米、对干扰物和部分遮挡具有鲁棒性的目标检测器。为了展示我们检测器的能力，我们展示了它们可用于在杂乱环境中执行抓取。据我们所知，这是首次成功将仅在模拟RGB图像上训练的深度神经网络（未在真实图像上预训练）迁移到真实世界用于机器人控制。

items.en: Performing robotic learning in a physics simulator could accelerate the impact of machine learning on robotics by allowing faster, more scalable, and lower-cost data collection than is possible with physical robots. Learning in simulation is especially promising for building on recent results using deep reinforcement learning to achieve human-level performance on tasks like Atari [27] and robotic control [21, 38]. Deep reinforcement learning employs random exploration, which can be dangerous on physical hardware. It often requires hundreds of thousands or millions of samples [27], which could take thousands of hours to collect, making it impractical for many applications. Ideally, we could learn policies that encode complex behaviors entirely in simulation and successfully run those policies on physical robots with minimal additional training.
items.zh: 在物理模拟器中进行机器人学习，可以通过比物理机器人更快、更可扩展且成本更低的数据收集，加速机器学习对机器人学的影响。在模拟中学习尤其有希望，因为它可以基于最近使用深度强化学习在Atari[27]和机器人控制[21,38]等任务上达到人类水平性能的成果。深度强化学习采用随机探索，这在物理硬件上可能很危险。它通常需要数十万或数百万个样本[27]，收集这些样本可能需要数千小时，使得它在许多应用中不切实际。理想情况下，我们可以在模拟中完全学习编码复杂行为的策略，并在物理机器人上成功运行这些策略，只需最少的额外训练。

items.en: Unfortunately, discrepancies between physics simulators and the real world make transferring behaviors from simulation challenging. System identification, the process of tuning the parameters of the simulation to match the behavior of the physical system, is time-consuming and error-prone. Even with strong system identification, the real world has unmodeled physical effects like nonrigidity, gear backlash, wear-and-tear, and fluid dynamics that are not captured by current physics simulators. Furthermore, low-fidelity simulated sensors like image renderers are often unable to reproduce the richness and noise produced by their real-world counterparts. These differences, known collectively as the reality gap, form the barrier to using simulated data on real robots.
items.zh: 不幸的是，物理模拟器与现实世界之间的差异使得从模拟迁移行为具有挑战性。系统辨识，即调整模拟参数以匹配物理系统行为的过程，既耗时又容易出错。即使进行了强大的系统辨识，现实世界也存在未建模的物理效应，如非刚性、齿轮间隙、磨损和流体动力学，这些在当前物理模拟器中未被捕捉。此外，低保真度的模拟传感器（如图像渲染器）通常无法再现真实世界对应物的丰富性和噪声。这些差异统称为现实差距，构成了在真实机器人上使用模拟数据的障碍。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Illustration of our approach. An object detector is trained on hundreds of thousands of low-fidelity rendered images with random camera positions, lighting conditions, object positions, and non-realistic textures. At test time, the same detector is used in the real world with no additional training.
items.capZh: 图1：我们方法的示意图。目标检测器在数十万张低保真度渲染图像上训练，这些图像具有随机相机位置、光照条件、目标位置和非真实纹理。在测试时，相同的检测器直接在真实世界中使用，无需额外训练。

items.en: This paper explores domain randomization, a simple but promising method for addressing the reality gap. Instead of training a model on a single simulated environment, we randomize the simulator to expose the model to a wide range of environments at training time. The purpose of this work is to test the following hypothesis: if the variability in simulation is significant enough, models trained in simulation will generalize to the real world with no additional training.
items.zh: 本文探讨了域随机化，这是一种简单但有前景的解决现实差距的方法。我们不是在单一模拟环境中训练模型，而是随机化模拟器，使模型在训练时暴露于广泛的环境。本工作的目的是检验以下假设：如果模拟中的变异性足够显著，那么在模拟中训练的模型将泛化到真实世界，无需额外训练。

items.en: Though in principle domain randomization could be applied to any component of the reality gap, we focus on the challenge of transferring from low-fidelity simulated camera images. Robotic control from camera pixels is attractive due to the low cost of cameras and the rich data they provide, but challenging because it involves processing high-dimensional input data. Recent work has shown that supervised learning with deep neural networks is a powerful tool for learning generalizable representations from high-dimensional inputs [20], but deep learning relies on a large amount of labeled data. Labeled data is difficult to obtain in the real world for precise robotic manipulation behaviors, but it is easy to generate in a physics simulator.
items.zh: 尽管原则上域随机化可以应用于现实差距的任何组成部分，但我们专注于从低保真度模拟相机图像迁移的挑战。基于相机像素的机器人控制因其相机成本低和提供丰富数据而具有吸引力，但由于涉及处理高维输入数据而具有挑战性。最近的工作表明，使用深度神经网络的监督学习是从高维输入中学习可泛化表示的强大工具[20]，但深度学习依赖于大量标注数据。在真实世界中，对于精确的机器人操作行为，标注数据难以获得，但在物理模拟器中很容易生成。

items.en: We focus on the task of training a neural network to detect the location of an object. Object localization from pixels is a well-studied problem in robotics, and state-of-the-art methods employ complex, hand-engineered image processing pipelines (e.g., [6], [5], [44]). This work is a first step toward the goal of using deep learning to improve the accuracy of object detection pipelines. Moreover, we see sim-to-real transfer for object localization as a stepping stone to transferring general-purpose manipulation behaviors.
items.zh: 我们专注于训练神经网络检测目标位置的任务。基于像素的目标定位是机器人学中一个研究充分的问题，最先进的方法采用复杂的、手工设计的图像处理流水线（例如[6]、[5]、[44]）。本工作是朝着使用深度学习提高目标检测流水线准确性目标迈出的第一步。此外，我们将目标定位的模拟到现实迁移视为迁移通用操作行为的垫脚石。

items.en: We find that for a range of geometric objects, we are able to train a detector that is accurate to around 1.5 cmtimes1.5centimeter1.5\text{\,}\mathrm{cm} in the real world using only simulated data rendered with simple, algorithmically generated textures. Although previous work demonstrated the ability to perform robotic control using a neural network pretrained on ImageNet and fine-tuned on randomized rendered pixels [37], this paper provides the first demonstration that domain randomization can be useful for robotic tasks requiring precision. We also provide an ablation study of the impact of different choices of randomization and training method on the success of transfer. We find that with a sufficient number of textures, pre-training the object detector using real images is unnecessary. To our knowledge, this is the first successful transfer of a deep neural network trained only on simulated RGB images to the real world for the purpose of robotic control.
items.zh: 我们发现，对于一系列几何物体，我们能够训练出一个检测器，在真实世界中精度约为1.5厘米，仅使用由简单算法生成纹理的模拟数据渲染而成。尽管先前的工作展示了使用在ImageNet上预训练并在随机化渲染像素上微调的神经网络进行机器人控制的能力[37]，但本文首次证明了域随机化可用于需要精度的机器人任务。我们还提供了不同随机化选择和训练方法对迁移成功影响的消融研究。我们发现，在纹理数量足够的情况下，无需使用真实图像预训练目标检测器。据我们所知，这是首次成功将仅在模拟RGB图像上训练的深度神经网络迁移到真实世界用于机器人控制。

full.sec: II-A Object detection and pose estimation for robotics
full.secZh: 二-A 机器人目标检测与姿态估计

items.en: Object detection and pose estimation for robotics is a well-studied problem in the literature (see, e.g., [4], [5], [6], [10], [44], [50], [54]). Recent approaches typically involve offline construction or learning of a 3D model of objects in the scene (e.g., a full 3D mesh model [44] or a 3D metric feature representation [5]). At test time, features from the test data (e.g., Scale-Invariant Feature Transform [SIFT] features [12] or color co-occurrence histograms [10]) are matched with the 3D models (or features from the 3D models). For example, a black-box nonlinear optimization algorithm can be used to minimize the re-projection error of the SIFT points from the object model and the 2D points in the test image [4]. Most successful approaches rely on using multiple camera frames [6] or depth information [44]. There has also been some success with only monocular camera images [4].
items.zh: 用于机器人学的目标检测和姿态估计是文献中研究充分的问题（例如，参见[4]、[5]、[6]、[10]、[44]、[50]、[54]）。最近的方法通常涉及离线构建或学习场景中物体的3D模型（例如，完整的3D网格模型[44]或3D度量特征表示[5]）。在测试时，测试数据的特征（例如，尺度不变特征变换[SIFT]特征[12]或颜色共现直方图[10]）与3D模型（或来自3D模型的特征）进行匹配。例如，可以使用黑箱非线性优化算法最小化物体模型的SIFT点与测试图像中2D点的重投影误差[4]。大多数成功的方法依赖于使用多个相机帧[6]或深度信息[44]。也有一些仅使用单目相机图像的成功案例[4]。

items.en: Compared to our method, traditional approaches require less extensive training and take advantage of richer sensory data, allowing them to detect the full 3D pose of objects (position and orientation) without any assumptions about the location or size of the surface on which the objects are placed. However, our approach avoids the challenging problem of 3D reconstruction, and employs a simple, easy to implement deep learning-based pipeline that may scale better to more challenging problems.
items.zh: 与我们的方法相比，传统方法需要较少的训练，并利用更丰富的感官数据，使其能够检测物体的完整3D姿态（位置和方向），而无需对物体所在表面的位置或大小做任何假设。然而，我们的方法避免了具有挑战性的3D重建问题，并采用简单、易于实现的基于深度学习的流水线，可能更好地扩展到更具挑战性的问题。

items.en: The computer vision community has devoted significant study to the problem of adapting vision-based models trained in a source domain to a previously unseen target domain (see, e.g., [9], [14], [15], [19], [23], [25], [51]). A variety of approaches have been proposed, including re-training the model in the target domain (e.g., [52]), adapting the weights of the model based on the statistics of the source and target domains (e.g., [22]), learning invariant features between domains (e.g., [47]), and learning a mapping from the target domain to the source domain (e.g., [43]). Researchers in the reinforcement learning community have also studied the problem of domain adaptation by learning invariant feature representations [13], adapting pretrained networks [35], and other methods. See [13] for a more complete treatment of domain adaptation in the reinforcement learning literature.
items.zh: 计算机视觉社区对适应从源域训练的视觉模型到未见过的目标域的问题进行了大量研究（例如，参见[9]、[14]、[15]、[19]、[23]、[25]、[51]）。已经提出了多种方法，包括在目标域中重新训练模型（例如，[52]）、基于源域和目标域的统计信息调整模型权重（例如，[22]）、学习域间不变特征（例如，[47]）以及学习从目标域到源域的映射（例如，[43]）。强化学习社区的研究者也通过学习不变特征表示[13]、适应预训练网络[35]和其他方法研究了域适应问题。关于强化学习文献中域适应的更完整处理，请参见[13]。

items.en: In this paper we study the possibility of transfer from simulation to the real world without performing domain adaptation.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在不进行域适应的情况下从模拟迁移到现实世界的可能性。

items.en: Previous work on leveraging simulated data for physical robotic experiments explored several strategies for bridging the reality gap.
items.zh: 先前关于利用模拟数据进行物理机器人实验的工作探索了几种弥合现实差距的策略。

items.en: One approach is to make the simulator closely match the physical reality by performing system identification and using high-quality rendering. Though using realistic RGB rendering alone has had limited success for transferring to real robotic tasks [16], incorporating realistic simulation of depth information can allow models trained on rendered images to transfer reasonably well to the real world [32]. Combining data from high-quality simulators with other approaches like fine-tuning can also reduce the number of labeled samples required in the real world [34].
items.zh: 一种方法是使模拟器通过系统辨识和使用高质量渲染来紧密匹配物理现实。尽管仅使用逼真的RGB渲染在迁移到真实机器人任务方面取得了有限的成功[16]，但结合深度信息的逼真模拟可以使在渲染图像上训练的模型相当好地迁移到真实世界[32]。将高质量模拟器的数据与其他方法（如微调）结合，也可以减少真实世界中所需的标注样本数量[34]。

items.en: Unlike these approaches, ours allows the use of low-quality renderers optimized for speed and not carefully matched to real-world textures, lighting, and scene configurations.
items.zh: 与这些方法不同，我们的方法允许使用针对速度优化且未仔细匹配真实世界纹理、光照和场景配置的低质量渲染器。

items.en: Other work explores using domain adaptation techniques to bridge the reality gap. It is often faster to fine-tune a controller learned in simulation than to learn from scratch in the real world [7, 18]. In [11], the authors use a variational autoencoder trained on simulated data to encode trajectories of motor outputs corresponding to a desired behavior type (e.g., reaching, grasping) as a low-dimensional latent code. A policy is learned on real data mapping features to distributions over latent codes. The learned policy overcomes the reality gap by choosing latent codes that correspond to the desired physical behavior via exploration.
items.zh: 其他工作探索使用域适应技术弥合现实差距。通常，微调在模拟中学习的控制器比在真实世界中从头学习更快[7,18]。在[11]中，作者使用在模拟数据上训练的自编码器将对应期望行为类型（例如，到达、抓取）的电机输出轨迹编码为低维潜在代码。在真实数据上学习一个策略，将特征映射到潜在代码的分布。学习到的策略通过选择对应期望物理行为的潜在代码来克服现实差距。

items.en: Domain adaptation has also been applied to robotic vision. Rusu et al. [36] explore using the progressive network architecture to adapt a model that is pre-trained on simulated pixels, and find it has better sample efficiency than fine-tuning or training in the real-world alone. In [46], the authors explore learning a correspondence between domains that allows the real images to be mapped into a space understood by the model. While both of the preceding approaches require reward functions or labeled data, which can be difficult to obtain in the real world, Mitash and collaborators [26] explore pretraining an object detector using realistic rendered images with randomized lighting from 3D models to bootstrap an automated learning learning process that does not require manually labeling data and uses only around 500 real-world samples.
items.zh: 域适应也已应用于机器人视觉。Rusu等人[36]探索使用渐进网络架构适应在模拟像素上预训练的模型，并发现其比微调或仅在真实世界中训练具有更好的样本效率。在[46]中，作者探索学习域之间的对应关系，使得真实图像可以映射到模型理解的空间。虽然这两种方法都需要奖励函数或标注数据，这在真实世界中可能难以获得，但Mitash及其合作者[26]探索使用来自3D模型的具有随机光照的逼真渲染图像预训练目标检测器，以启动自动学习过程，该过程不需要手动标注数据，仅使用约500个真实世界样本。

items.en: A related idea, iterative learning control, employs real-world data to improve the dynamics model used to determine the optimal control behavior, rather than using real-world data to improve the controller directly. Iterative learning control starts with a dynamics model, applies the corresponding control behavior on the real system, and then closes the loop by using the resulting data to improve the dynamics model. Iterative learning control has been applied to a variety of robotic control problems, from model car control (e.g., [1] and [8]) to surgical robotics (e.g., [48]).
items.zh: 一个相关的想法是迭代学习控制，它使用真实世界数据来改进用于确定最优控制行为的动力学模型，而不是直接使用真实世界数据改进控制器。迭代学习控制从动力学模型开始，在真实系统上应用相应的控制行为，然后通过使用结果数据改进动力学模型来闭合循环。迭代学习控制已应用于各种机器人控制问题，从模型车控制（例如，[1]和[8]）到手术机器人（例如，[48]）。

items.en: Domain adaptation and iterative learning control are important tools for addressing the reality gap, but in contrast to these approaches, ours requires no additional training on real-world data. Our method can also be combined easily with most domain adaptation techniques.
items.zh: 域适应和迭代学习控制是解决现实差距的重要工具，但与这些方法相比，我们的方法不需要在真实世界数据上进行额外训练。我们的方法也可以轻松地与大多数域适应技术结合。

items.en: Several authors have previously explored the idea of using domain randomization to bridge the reality gap.
items.zh: 几位作者先前探索了使用域随机化弥合现实差距的想法。

items.en: In the context of physics adaptation, Mordatch and collaborators [28] show that training a policy on an ensemble of dynamics models can make the controller robust to modeling error and improve transfer to a real robot. Similarly, in [2], the authors train a policy to pivot a tool held in the robot’s gripper in a simulator with randomized friction and action delays, and find that it works in the real world and is robust to errors in estimation of the system parameters.
items.zh: 在物理适应性的背景下，Mordatch及其合作者[28]表明，在动力学模型集成上训练策略可以使控制器对建模误差具有鲁棒性，并改善向真实机器人的迁移。类似地，在[2]中，作者在具有随机摩擦和动作延迟的模拟器中训练策略以操纵机器人夹爪中的工具，并发现它在真实世界中有效，且对系统参数估计误差具有鲁棒性。

items.en: Rather than relying on controller robustness, Yu et al. [53] use a model trained on varied physics to perform system identification using online trajectory data, but their approach is not shown to succeed in the real world. Rajeswaran et al. [33] explore different training strategies for learning from an ensemble of models, including adversarial training and adapting the ensemble distribution using data from the target domain, but also do not demonstrate successful real-world transfer.
items.zh: Yu等人[53]不依赖控制器鲁棒性，而是使用在多种物理条件下训练的模型，通过在线轨迹数据进行系统辨识，但他们的方法未在真实世界中成功展示。Rajeswaran等人[33]探索了从模型集成中学习的不同训练策略，包括对抗训练和使用目标域数据调整集成分布，但同样未展示成功的真实世界迁移。

items.en: Researchers in computer vision have used 3D models as a tool to improve performance on real images since the earliest days of the field (e.g., [30], [24]). More recently, 3D models have been used to augment training data to aid transferring deep neural networks between datasets and prevent over-fitting on small datasets for tasks like viewpoint estimation [40] and object detection [42], [29]. Recent work has explored using only synthetic data for training 2D object detectors (i.e., predicting a bounding box for objects in the scene). In [31], the authors find that by pretraining a network on ImageNet and fine-tuning on synthetic data created from 3D models, better detection performance on the PASCAL dataset can be achieved than training with only a few labeled examples from the real dataset.
items.zh: 计算机视觉研究人员自该领域早期起就使用3D模型作为工具来提高真实图像的性能（例如，[30]，[24]）。最近，3D模型被用于增强训练数据，以帮助深度神经网络在数据集之间迁移，并防止在视角估计[40]和物体检测[42]，[29]等任务的小数据集上过拟合。近期工作探索了仅使用合成数据训练2D物体检测器（即预测场景中物体的边界框）。在[31]中，作者发现通过在ImageNet上预训练网络，然后在由3D模型创建的合成数据上微调，可以在PASCAL数据集上获得比仅使用少量真实数据集标注示例更好的检测性能。

items.en: In contrast to our work, most object detection results in computer vision use realistic textures, but do not create coherent 3D scenes. Instead, objects are rendered against a solid background or a randomly chosen photograph. As a result, our approach allows our models to understand the 3D spatial information necessary for rich interactions with the physical world.
items.zh: 与我们的工作不同，计算机视觉中的大多数物体检测结果使用逼真纹理，但不创建连贯的3D场景。相反，物体在纯色背景或随机选择的照片上渲染。因此，我们的方法使模型能够理解与物理世界进行丰富交互所需的3D空间信息。

items.en: Sadeghi and Levine’s work [37] is the most similar to our own. The authors demonstrate that a policy mapping images to controls learned in a simulator with varied 3D scenes and textures can be applied successfully to real-world quadrotor flight. However, their experiments – collision avoidance in hallways and open spaces – do not demonstrate the ability to deal with high-precision tasks. Our approach also does not rely on precise camera information or calibration, instead randomizing the position, orientation, and field of view of the camera in the simulator. Whereas their approach chooses textures from a dataset of around 200200200 pre-generated materials, most of which are realistic, our approach is the first to use only non-realistic textures created by a simple random generation process, which allows us to train on hundreds of thousands (or more) of unique texturizations of the scene.
items.zh: Sadeghi和Levine的工作[37]与我们的工作最为相似。作者证明，在具有多样化3D场景和纹理的模拟器中学习到的图像到控制策略可以成功应用于真实世界的四旋翼飞行。然而，他们的实验——走廊和开放空间中的避障——并未展示处理高精度任务的能力。我们的方法也不依赖精确的相机信息或校准，而是在模拟器中随机化相机的位置、方向和视野。而他们的方法从大约200200200个预生成材质的数据集中选择纹理，其中大多数是逼真的，我们的方法是第一个仅使用简单随机生成过程创建的非逼真纹理的方法，这使我们能够训练数十万（或更多）种独特的场景纹理。

items.en: Given some objects of interest {si}isubscriptsubscript𝑠𝑖𝑖\{s_{i}\}_{i}, our goal is to train an object detector d​(I0)𝑑subscript𝐼0d(I_{0}) that maps a single monocular camera frame I0subscript𝐼0I_{0} to the Cartesian coordinates {(xi,yi,zi)}isubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖subscript𝑧𝑖𝑖\{(x_{i},y_{i},z_{i})\}_{i} of each object. In addition to the objects of interest, our scenes sometimes contain distractor objects that must be ignored by the network. Our approach is to train a deep neural network in simulation using domain randomization. The remainder of this section describes the specific domain randomization and neural network training methodology we use.
items.zh: 给定一些感兴趣物体{si}i\{s_i\}_i，我们的目标是训练一个物体检测器d(I0)d(I_0)，将单个单目相机帧I0I_0映射到每个物体的笛卡尔坐标{(xi,yi,zi)}i\{(x_i,y_i,z_i)\}_i。除了感兴趣物体外，我们的场景有时包含网络必须忽略的干扰物体。我们的方法是在模拟中使用域随机化训练深度神经网络。本节剩余部分描述我们使用的具体域随机化和神经网络训练方法。

items.en: The purpose of domain randomization is to provide enough simulated variability at training time such that at test time the model is able to generalize to real-world data. We randomize the following aspects of the domain for each sample used during training:
items.zh: 域随机化的目的是在训练时提供足够的模拟变异性，使得在测试时模型能够泛化到真实世界数据。我们对每个训练样本的以下域方面进行随机化：

items.en: Number and shape of distractor objects on the table
items.zh: 桌子上干扰物体的数量和形状

items.en: Position and texture of all objects on the table
items.zh: 桌子上所有物体的位置和纹理

items.en: Textures of the table, floor, skybox, and robot
items.zh: 桌子、地板、天空盒和机器人的纹理

items.en: Position, orientation, and field of view of the camera
items.zh: 相机的位置、方向和视野

items.en: Position, orientation, and specular characteristics of the lights
items.zh: 灯光的位置、方向和镜面特性

items.en: Type and amount of random noise added to images
items.zh: 添加到图像中的噪声类型和数量

items.en: Since we use a single monocular camera image from an uncalibrated camera to estimate object positions, we fix the height of the table in simulation, effectively creating a 2D pose estimation task. Random textures are chosen among the following:
items.zh: 由于我们使用来自未校准相机的单个单目相机图像来估计物体位置，我们在模拟中固定桌子的高度，从而有效地创建一个2D姿态估计任务。随机纹理从以下选项中选择：

items.en: A checker pattern between two random RGB values
items.zh: 两个随机RGB值之间的棋盘图案

items.en: The textures of all objects are chosen uniformly at random – the detector does not have access to the color of the object(s) of interest at training time, only their size and shape. We render images using the MuJoCo Physics Engine’s [45] built-in renderer. This renderer is not intended to be photo-realistic, and physically plausible choices of textures and lighting are not needed.
items.zh: 所有物体的纹理均匀随机选择——检测器在训练时无法访问感兴趣物体的颜色，只能访问其大小和形状。我们使用MuJoCo物理引擎[45]的内置渲染器渲染图像。该渲染器不追求照片级真实感，物理上合理的纹理和光照选择并非必需。

items.en: Between 00 and 101010 distractor objects are added to the table in each scene. Distractor objects on the floor or in the background are unnecessary, despite some clutter (e.g., cables) on the floor in our real images.
items.zh: 每个场景中在桌子上添加0到101010个干扰物体。尽管我们的真实图像中地板上有一些杂乱（例如电缆），但地板或背景上的干扰物体是不必要的。

items.en: Our method avoids calibration and precise placement of the camera in the real world by randomizing characteristics of the cameras used to render images in training. We manually place a camera in the simulated scene that approximately matches the viewpoint and field of view of the real camera. Each training sample places the camera randomly within a (10×5×10)10510(10\times 5\times 10) cm box around this initial point. The viewing angle of the camera is calculated analytically to point at a fixed point on the table, and then offset by up to 0.10.10.1 radians in each direction. The field of view is also scaled by up to 5 %times5percent5\text{\,}\mathrm{\char 37\relax} from the starting point.
items.zh: 我们的方法通过随机化训练中用于渲染图像的相机特性，避免了真实世界中的校准和精确相机放置。我们在模拟场景中手动放置一个相机，大致匹配真实相机的视角和视野。每个训练样本将相机随机放置在该初始点周围的(10×5×10)(10\times 5\times 10)厘米盒子内。相机的视角通过解析计算指向桌子上的一个固定点，然后在每个方向上偏移最多0.10.1弧度。视野也从起始点缩放最多5%5\text{\,}\mathrm{\char 37\relax}。

full.secZh: 三-B 模型架构与训练

items.capEn: Figure 2: The model architecture used in our experiments. Each vertical bar corresponds to a layer of the model. ReLU nonlinearities are used throughout, and max pooling occurs between each of the groupings of convolutional layers. The input is an image from an external webcam downsized to (224×224)224224(224\times 224) and the output of the network predicts the (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) coordinates of object(s) of interest.
items.capZh: 图2：我们实验中使用的模型架构。每个垂直条对应模型的一个层。全程使用ReLU非线性激活函数，并在每组卷积层之间进行最大池化。输入是来自外部网络摄像头的图像，缩小到(224×224)(224\times 224)，网络输出预测感兴趣物体的(x,y,z)(x,y,z)坐标。

items.en: We parametrize our object detector with a deep convolutional neural network. In particular, we use a modified version the VGG-16 architecture [39] shown in Figure 2. We chose this architecture because it performs well on a variety of computer vision tasks, and because it has a wide availability of pretrained weights. We use the standard VGG convolutional layers, but use smaller fully connected layers of sizes 256256256 and 646464 and do not use dropout. For the majority of our experiments, we use weights obtained by pretraining on ImageNet to initialize the convolutional layers, which we hypothesized would be essential to achieving transfer. In practice, we found that using random weight initialization works as well in most cases.
items.zh: 我们使用深度卷积神经网络参数化物体检测器。具体来说，我们使用图2所示的VGG-16架构[39]的修改版本。我们选择此架构是因为它在各种计算机视觉任务上表现良好，并且有广泛可用的预训练权重。我们使用标准的VGG卷积层，但使用更小的全连接层，大小为256256和6464，并且不使用dropout。在大多数实验中，我们使用在ImageNet上预训练获得的权重来初始化卷积层，我们假设这对于实现迁移至关重要。实际上，我们发现使用随机权重初始化在大多数情况下同样有效。

items.en: We train the detector through stochastic gradient descent on the L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} loss between the object positions estimated by the network and the true object positions using the Adam optimizer [17]. We found that using a learning rate of around 1​e−41e41\mathrm{e}{-4} (as opposed to the standard 1​e−31e31\mathrm{e}{-3} for Adam) improved convergence and helped avoid a common local optimum, mapping all objects to the center of the table.
items.zh: 我们通过随机梯度下降训练检测器，使用 Adam 优化器 [17] 优化网络估计的目标位置与真实目标位置之间的 L2 损失。我们发现使用约 1e-4 的学习率（而非 Adam 的标准 1e-3）改善了收敛性，并有助于避免常见的局部最优解（将所有目标映射到桌子中心）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The geometric objects used in our experiments.
items.capZh: 图 3：实验中使用的几何物体。

items.en: We evaluated our approach by training object detectors for each of eight geometric objects. We constructed mesh representations for each object to render in the simulator. Each training sample consists of (a) a rendered image of the object and one or more distractors (also from among the geometric object set) on a simulated tabletop and (b) a label corresponding to the Cartesian coordinates of the center of mass of the object in the world frame.
items.zh: 我们通过为八个几何物体分别训练目标检测器来评估我们的方法。我们为每个物体构建了网格表示，以便在模拟器中渲染。每个训练样本包括：(a) 物体及一个或多个干扰物（也来自几何物体集）在模拟桌面上的渲染图像，以及 (b) 对应物体在世界坐标系中质心笛卡尔坐标的标签。

items.en: For each experiment, we performed a small hyperparameter search, evaluating combinations of two learning rates (1​e−41e41\mathrm{e}{-4} and 2​e−42e42\mathrm{e}{-4}) and three batch sizes (252525, 505050, and 100100100). We report the performance of the best network.
items.zh: 对于每个实验，我们进行了小规模超参数搜索，评估了两个学习率（1e-4 和 2e-4）与三个批次大小（25、50 和 100）的组合。我们报告了最佳网络的性能。

items.en: Evaluate the localization accuracy of our trained detectors in the real world, including in the presence of distractor objects and partial occlusions
items.zh: 评估我们训练的检测器在真实世界中的定位精度，包括存在干扰物和部分遮挡的情况。

items.en: Assess which elements of our approach are most critical for achieving transfer from simulation to the real world
items.zh: 评估我们方法中哪些元素对实现从模拟到真实世界的迁移最为关键。

items.en: Determine whether the learned detectors are accurate enough to perform robotic manipulation tasks
items.zh: 确定学习到的检测器是否足够精确以执行机器人操作任务。

items.en: To evaluate the accuracy of learned detectors in the real world, we captured 480480480 webcam images of one or more geometric objects on a table at a distance of 70 cm to 105 cmrangetimes70centimetertimes105centimeter70\text{\,}\mathrm{cm}105\text{\,}\mathrm{cm} from the camera. The camera position remains constant across all images. We did not control for lighting conditions or the rest of the scene around the table (e.g., all images contain part of the robot and tape and wires on the floor). We measured ground truth positions for a single object per image by aligning the object on a grid on the tabletop. Each of the eight geometric objects has 60 labeled images in the dataset: 202020 with the object alone on the table, 202020 in which one or more distractor objects are present on the table, and 202020 in which the object is also partially occluded by another object.
items.zh: 为了评估学习到的检测器在真实世界中的精度，我们使用网络摄像头在距离相机 70 cm 到 105 cm 的范围内拍摄了 480 张包含一个或多个几何物体的桌面图像。相机位置在所有图像中保持不变。我们没有控制光照条件或桌子周围场景的其他部分（例如，所有图像都包含部分机器人以及地板上的胶带和电线）。我们通过将物体对齐到桌面上的网格来测量每张图像中单个物体的真实位置。每个几何物体在数据集中有 60 张标注图像：20 张物体单独在桌面上，20 张桌面上存在一个或多个干扰物，20 张物体被另一个物体部分遮挡。

items.en: To evaluate the importance of different factors of our training methodology, we assessed the sensitivity of the algorithm to the following:
items.zh: 为了评估我们训练方法中不同因素的重要性，我们评估了算法对以下因素的敏感性：

items.en: Number of unique textures seen in training
items.zh: 训练中看到的独特纹理数量

items.en: Randomization of camera position in training
items.zh: 训练中相机位置的随机化

items.en: Use of pre-trained weights in the detection model
items.zh: 检测模型中使用预训练权重

items.en: We found that the method is at least somewhat sensitive to all of the factors except the use of random noise.
items.zh: 我们发现该方法至少对所有因素（除使用随机噪声外）都有一定敏感性。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Sensitivity of test error on real images to the number of simulated training examples used. Each training example corresponds to a single labeled example of an object on the table with between 0 and 10 distractor objects. Lighting and all textures are randomized between iterations.
items.capZh: 图 4：真实图像上的测试误差对使用的模拟训练样本数量的敏感性。每个训练样本对应一个物体在桌面上带有 0 到 10 个干扰物的单个标注示例。光照和所有纹理在每次迭代之间随机化。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Sensitivity to amount of texture randomization. In each case, the detector was trained using 10,0001000010,000 random object positions and combinations of distractors, but only the given number of unique texturizations and lighting conditions were used.
items.capZh: 图 5：对纹理随机化量的敏感性。在每种情况下，检测器使用 10,000 个随机物体位置和干扰物组合进行训练，但仅使用给定数量的独特纹理和光照条件。

items.en: To demonstrate the potential of this technique for transferring robotic behaviors learned in simulation to the real world, we evaluated the use of our object detection networks for localizing an object in clutter and performing a prescribed grasp. For two of our most consistently accurate detectors, we evaluated the ability to pick up the detected object in 20 increasingly cluttered scenes using the positions estimated by the detector and off-the-shelf motion planning software [41]. To test the robustness of our method to discrepancies in object distributions between training and test time, some of our test images contain distractors placed at orientations not seen during training (e.g., a hexagonal prism placed on its side).
items.zh: 为了展示这种技术将模拟中学习的机器人行为迁移到真实世界的潜力，我们评估了使用目标检测网络在杂乱环境中定位物体并执行指定抓取的能力。对于两个最稳定的精确检测器，我们评估了在 20 个逐渐杂乱的场景中使用检测器估计的位置和现成的运动规划软件 [41] 拾取检测到的物体的能力。为了测试我们的方法对训练和测试时物体分布差异的鲁棒性，一些测试图像包含以训练中未见过的方向放置的干扰物（例如，侧放的六棱柱）。

items.en: We deployed the pipeline on a Fetch robot [49], and found it was able to successfully detect and pick up the target object in 38 out of 40 trials, including in highly cluttered scenes with significant occlusion of the target object. Note that the trained detectors have no prior information about the color of the target object, only its shape and size, and are able to detect objects placed closely to other objects of the same color.
items.zh: 我们在 Fetch 机器人 [49] 上部署了该流程，发现它能够在 40 次试验中的 38 次成功检测并拾取目标物体，包括在目标物体严重遮挡的高度杂乱场景中。注意，训练好的检测器没有关于目标物体颜色的先验信息，只有其形状和大小，并且能够检测到紧邻同色其他物体的物体。

items.en: To test the performance of our object detectors on real-world objects with non-uniform textures, we trained an object detector to localize a can of Spam from the YCB Dataset [3]. At training time, the can was present on the table along with geometric object distractors. At test time, instead of using geometric object distractors, we placed other food items from the YCB set on the table. The detector was able to ignore the previously unseen distractors and pick up the target in 9 of 10 trials.
items.zh: 为了测试我们的目标检测器在具有非均匀纹理的真实世界物体上的性能，我们训练了一个目标检测器来定位 YCB 数据集 [3] 中的 Spam 罐头。在训练时，罐头与几何物体干扰物一起出现在桌面上。在测试时，我们使用 YCB 数据集中的其他食品物品代替几何物体干扰物放置在桌面上。检测器能够忽略之前未见过的干扰物，并在 10 次试验中的 9 次成功拾取目标。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Two representative executions of grasping objects using vision learned in simulation only. The object detector network estimates the positions of the object of interest, and then a motion planner plans a simple sequence of motions to grasp the object at that location.
items.capZh: 图 6：仅使用模拟中学习的视觉进行抓取物体的两次代表性执行。目标检测器网络估计感兴趣物体的位置，然后运动规划器规划一系列简单的运动以在该位置抓取物体。

items.en: We demonstrated that an object detector trained only in simulation can achieve high enough accuracy in the real world to perform grasping in clutter. Future work will explore how to make this technique reliable and effective enough to perform tasks that require contact-rich manipulation or higher precision.
items.zh: 我们证明了仅在模拟中训练的目标检测器可以在真实世界中达到足够高的精度，以执行杂乱环境中的抓取。未来的工作将探索如何使该技术足够可靠和有效，以执行需要接触丰富的操作或更高精度的任务。

items.en: Future directions that could improve the accuracy of object detectors trained using domain randomization include:
items.zh: 未来可通过以下方向提高使用域随机化训练的目标检测器的准确性：

items.en: Introducing additional forms of texture, lighting, and rendering randomization to the simulation and training on more data
items.zh: 在仿真中引入更多形式的纹理、光照和渲染随机化，并使用更多数据进行训练

items.en: Incorporating multiple camera viewpoints, stereo vision, or depth information
items.zh: 融合多摄像头视角、立体视觉或深度信息

items.en: Combining domain randomization with domain adaptation
items.zh: 将域随机化与域自适应相结合

items.en: Domain randomization is a promising research direction toward bridging the reality gap for robotic behaviors learned in simulation. Deep reinforcement learning may allow more complex policies to be learned in simulation through large-scale exploration and optimization, and domain randomization could be an important tool for making such policies useful on real robots.
items.zh: 域随机化是弥合仿真中习得的机器人行为与现实差距的一个有前景的研究方向。深度强化学习可能通过大规模探索和优化，在仿真中学习更复杂的策略，而域随机化可能是使此类策略在真实机器人上发挥作用的重要工具。
